task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigated to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/.

task_completion.description: Search and view chemical datasheets for the required chemicals
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the CAMEO Chemicals datasheet for one or more of the specified chemicals, specifically looking at the USCG CHRIS Code and USCG Compatibility Group sections.

task_completion.description: Create a file with the correct CSV headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet application is open showing the exact headers: 'Chemical Name, CHRIS Code, USCG Group'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct CHRIS codes and USCG Compatibility Groups for all five chemicals
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document contains the correct data for all five chemicals: Acrylonitrile (ACN, 15), Morpholine (MPL, 7), Styrene monomer (STY, 30), Sulfuric acid (SFA, 2), and Propionic acid (PNA, 4). Ensure the USCG Group is used, not the NOAA Reactive Group.

task_completion.description: Save the CSV file to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file is saved with the name 'marine_manifest.csv' and is located in the Desktop directory (visible via a 'Save As' dialog, file manager, desktop icon, or terminal verification).

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to retrieve data
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actively used a graphical web browser to search for the chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals, rather than using a terminal script (like curl or python) to fetch data.

integrity.description: Agent used a GUI application to create the CSV
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used a graphical text editor or spreadsheet application to create and edit the CSV file, rather than solely using terminal commands like 'echo' to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely retrieved data from the website
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent visited the individual chemical pages to retrieve the data, rather than hallucinating the values or typing them from memory without searching.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified correct data for the manifest: Acrylonitrile (CHRIS: ACN, Group: 15), Morpholine (CHRIS: MPL, Group: 7), Styrene monomer (CHRIS: STY, Group: 30), Sulfuric acid (CHRIS: SFA, Group: 2), Propionic acid (CHRIS: PNA, Group: 4). Note: Morpholine's correct CHRIS code is MPL. Ensure the agent uses the USCG Compatibility Group, not the NOAA Reactive Group.
